seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: Use the phrase "upcoming exhibitions" exactly three times.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. Use the phrase "upcoming exhibitions" exactly three times. Avoid using the phrase "upcoming exhibitions".
response:
Subject: Inquiry about Current and Future Shows

Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am a great admirer of the work featured at your gallery and have been following your programming with great interest. I was hoping you could provide me with some information regarding your schedule.

Could you please send me details about your forthcoming shows? I am particularly interested in learning more about the **upcoming exhibitions** you have planned for the next few months.

Additionally, if you have a digital calendar or a list detailing all the **upcoming exhibitions**, I would be very grateful if you could share that with me.

Thank you very much for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing from you and hopefully visiting one of your **upcoming exhibitions** soon!

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number or Preferred Contact Info]<turn|>
